title: 100% Cotton Cellular Soft Baby Blanket for Cot Pram Moses Basket, Pink, 60x90cm
features: Cellular construction helps keep your baby at the perfect temperature
Comes in two sizes to meet your needs - 60x90cm or 100x150cm
Range of 4 great colours - ideal for a gift
description: Product Description Soft & Gentle for Delicate Skin Our cellular blankets are crafted from 100% pure cotton , making them beautifully soft and breathable – perfect for your baby's delicate skin. Whether it's nap time or playtime, your little one will stay cosy and comfortable. Breathable Cellular Weave The clever cellular construction allows air to circulate while keeping your baby snug – helping to maintain the perfect sleeping temperature. Classic Colours, Timeless Style Choose from four gentle colours to match your baby’s world – calming tones that never go out of style. Two Sizes to Suit Your Baby Whether you need a compact blanket for a car seat or a larger size for bedtime, we’ve got you covered with two practical size options. Designed for Sweet Dreams Our cellular blanket keeps your baby comfortable through every nap and night-time, with a soft, airy weave that promotes natural airflow and helps regulate temperature
